voice_observations.caption_text:
It’s a mommy & me shopping day! @olafarahat explores the all-new Little Level, finding festive favorites for her daughter and herself. Shop their picks on levelshoes.com✨

Ola wears Paris Texas, Lily wears Converse.
voice_observations.voiceover_text: It's mommy and lily's shopping day out today. We are at little level having the best time shopping together Lily was playing non-stop She loved the octopus mascot and she also loves to shop just like her mama I loved all the festive sparkle in the holiday collection There were so many things to choose from the collection was so diverse There was something for every age and every style We took a little break and grabbed some matcha from chow club and i'm telling you guys This was the best matcha I have ever had it did not disappoint and now it was my turn to shop I found the most stunning renee covela shoes. There was so much to choose from I literally had to hold myself back from getting almost everything, but I did end up getting these beauties Did I mention I have a thing for pink shoes? I just love the nice pop of color I loved the festive feels that level today. We had the best time shopping
notable_phrases: It’s a mommy & me shopping day! explores the all-new Little Level, finding festive favorites for her daughter and herself. Shop their picks on levelshoes.com
Ola wears Paris Texas, Lily wears Converse
voice_observations.hook_text: It’s a mommy & me shopping day!
